title: Confluence Infernum Music
description: Adds Infernum Music to Confluence: Otherworld (TerrariaCraft) bosses
body:
Gives Confluence: Otherworld's bosses the Infernum mod soundtrack

Credit to Pinpin Neon for composing the Infernum OST


King Slime - Gelatinous Dynasty

Eye of Cthulhu - Seer of the Night

Eater of Worlds - Maw of the Corruption

Brain of Cthulhu - Intellect of the Crimson

Queen Bee - Royal Retaliation

Skeletron - Warden of the Damned

Wall of Flesh - One's End, Another's Beginning


Note: This mod uses the same logic as Boss Music Mod by theexiiedfellow
